title: Bonamia glomerata

The classification of Bonamia glomerata is as follows: Kingdom: Plantae, Clade: Angiosperms, Clade: Eudicots, Clade: Asterids, Order: Gentianales, Family: Apocynaceae, Genus: Bonamia, Species: B. glomerata.

intro: Bonamia glomerata is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the family Polemoniaceae, commonly known as the globe mallow or Mexican globe mallow. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various health issues, including inflammation, pain, and respiratory problems, due to its potential anti-inflammatory, analgesic, and antiseptic properties.
